title: DELEE Bath Toys 4Packs Animal Shaped Pop Tubes Baby Bath Toys with LED Lights Floating Swimming Water Toys,Perfect for Bath Time Fun,Travel,Pool Play,Idea Gift for 3 4 5 year olds Toddlers and Kids
features: 【Safe & Durable Baby Bath Toys】DELEE's light-up bath toys are crafted from high-quality, non-toxic plastic, ensuring safety for toddler kids. Featuring a cute animal design that wraps around the ends of the tubes, these bath toys are not only visually appealing but also designed to be kid-friendly with smooth edges to prevent any accidental scratches. Perfect as baby bath toys for kids aged 0-6 years, they provide a worry-free playtime experience.

【Illuminated Water Play Toys】Each set includes four unique animal pop tubes—dinosaur, crocodile, giraffe, and dolphin—that come to life with built-in blinking LED lights. As the tubes stretch and bend, they emit a captivating glow, transforming bath time into an enchanting experience. These light up bath toys make every splash and stretch exciting, ideal for toddler bath toys and water play toys in paddling pools.

【Versatile Travel Toys & Stress Relievers】Beyond as the bath toys, these versatile travel toys accompany kids on trips, offering a fun distraction during car rides or airplane journeys. For older kids and even adults, twisting and stretching these pop tubes can serve as a stress reliever, helping to alleviate anxiety from daily routines. They double as sensory toys for children with autism or ADHD, promoting focus and relaxation.

【Endless Creativity & Learning Fun】Encourage imaginative play as children reshape the flexible tubes into countless figures, sparking creativity and fine motor skills development. Suitable for various age groups, including bath toys for 1+ year olds, 2+ year olds, and beyond, these toys foster learning through play, making them excellent swim toys for young ones exploring water environments.

【The Ultimate Bath Time Gift Set】DELEE's toys make for a standout gift choice, perfect for birthday parties, holiday celebrations, or as part of a treasure chest reward system. The colorful creative design (Note: comes without individual boxes) adds to the excitement, making it a delightful present for boys and girls alike. Whether it's a Christmas stocking filler, a pool party favor, or a special treat for In the Night Garden toys fans, these bath toys guarantee smiles all around.
